impl_review_rounds.convergence_reason: Trend 13→7→1. Round 3 returned 0 findings from claude+codex; the lone gemini finding was a low polish item (type hint + imports) that does not change runtime behavior. Inline-fixed within reviewer-text-edit scope; no round-4 dispatch (would exceed max_rounds=3 contract). Mirrors the PLAN_REVIEW round-3 convergence pattern (10→inline).

plan_review_rounds.convergence_reason: Trend 34→33→13→10. Round 3 findings were all mechanical completeness of round-2 fix propagation, not new architectural concerns. Applied inline without round-4 dispatch (would have been outside max_rounds=3 contract and offered low marginal value over textual grep verification).

transitions.note: PLAN already done; force bypassed complexity gate; proceeding to self-review
Self-review found 34 findings; 6 inline fixes; 7 deferred to vendor consensus
Round 1 (3-vendor): 33 unique findings; thematic clustering surfaced 2 cross-vendor architectural issues; 7 inline fixes; plan_revision bump 1→2

Round 2 (3-vendor): 13 unique findings; surfaced 4 regressions from round-1 fixes plus RUN_ERROR migration (upstream RunFinishedEvent has no error field); 6 critical/high inline fixes plus 1 low polish; plan_revision bump 2→3

Round 3 (3-vendor): 10 findings, all completeness-of-round-2-fixes; inline-fixed without round 4 dispatch (within reviewer-text-edit scope). Convergence declared: trend 34→33→13→10, no new architectural concerns, validate --strict passes.
All 6 work packages complete (57/57 tasks); transitioning to self-review.

Round 1 (analyst sub-agent): 9 findings, 1 critical + 3 high + 5 medium. Critical: astream_invoke signature mismatch (routes.py call site missing agent arg) — feature was broken in production despite green gates because fakes mirrored the broken call. Fixed 5 (critical + 2 high + 2 medium), deferred 4 (concurrency-lock + health-auth + tool_run_id fallback + auto-fixed-by-#1). Gates: 974 pytest pass (+7), ruff/mypy/openspec clean. Convergence declared after one round; transitioning to multi-vendor IMPL_REVIEW.

Round 1 (3-vendor: claude_code/codex/gemini local CLIs): 13 unique findings, all single-vendor (0 confirmed) — high breadth, low overlap. Distribution: 4 critical, 3 high, 4 medium, 2 low. Fixed 9 inline (commit 885177c): by_alias serialization, httpx lifespan ownership, TextMessageStart role, except Exception narrowing, traced_harness inner-gen aclose, stable tool_call_id mapping, thread_id stability, GeneratorExit-as-cancelled, sentinel default_role test. Deferred 4 (claude #3 cli double-construct + claude #4 ::1 warning + gemini #3 args chunking + gemini #4 interleaved text/tool). Gates: 980 pytest pass (+6 regressions), ruff/mypy/openspec clean.

Round 2 (3-vendor): 7 findings (down 46% from round 1). Distribution: 0 critical, 0 high, 4 medium, 3 low. ONE cross-vendor confirmation (first of the entire phase): claude-r2-2 + codex-r2-1 both flagged the single-slot pending_orphan_call_id limitation for parallel-MSAF missing-id orphans. Fixed 5 inline (commit d36850c): collections.deque[str] FIFO for orphans, contextlib.aclosing on inner LangGraph stream, defensive aclose pattern for MSAF ResponseStream (per SDK contract), structural inspect.getsource test for thread_id stability (replaces illusory __new__-bypass test), 2 docstring corrections. Deferred 2 (claude-r2-2 partially-deferred as acceptable v1 best-effort but pursued via codex's deque proposal; claude-r2-3 MagicMock auto-truthy httpx in test paths is harmless). Gates: 981 pytest pass (+1 regression), ruff/mypy/openspec clean.

Round 3 (3-vendor): 1 finding total — claude 0, codex 0, gemini 1 (low polish). Trend: 13→7→1. Inline polish landed without round-4 dispatch (max_rounds=3): MSAgentFrameworkHarness.astream_invoke return type AsyncIterator[Any]→AsyncIterator[HarnessEvent], HarnessEvent added to imports, json import moved to top-level. Convergence declared: 0 critical/high/medium across all 3 vendors. Gates: 981 pytest, ruff/mypy/openspec clean. Transitioning to VALIDATE.

VALIDATE phase PASS (inline-driven, code-only feature). Applicable phases: architecture diagnostics PASS, spec compliance PASS (0 task drift / 57 checked / openspec --strict valid / 22 requirements with full traceability), quality gates PASS (981 pytest / ruff / mypy / openspec clean). Skipped phases (not applicable to library/CLI v1): Deploy (no docker-compose), Smoke (in-process equivalent in tests/integration/test_ag_ui_smoke.py covers 4 scenarios + 1 round-1 regression), Security (loopback-only by D12), E2E (requires paid LLM API key), Log analysis (no live service). CI/CD status deferred to SUBMIT_PR — GitHub Actions fires on PR creation. Artifacts: validation-report.md + architecture-impact.md committed. val_review_enabled=false → skip VAL_REVIEW; transition to SUBMIT_PR.
